% AUTOGENERATED by scripts/render_paper_tables.py — do not edit by hand.
% Regenerate via `uv run python scripts/render_paper_tables.py` after
% changing any source data or the paper's tables.py spec.
% Description: validate.py @register_check decorators
\begin{tabular}{cll}
\hline
\textbf{Check} & \textbf{Name} & \textbf{What it verifies} \\
\hline
1 & \texttt{formulas} & Python formulas reference valid Lean theorems \\
2 & \texttt{numerical} & Experimental parameters match reference values \\
3 & \texttt{identities} & Mathematical identities and boundary conditions hold \\
4 & \texttt{paper_table} & Paper 1 Table 1 values match solver output \\
5 & \texttt{theorems} & Theorem registry has 322 entries and is self-consistent \\
6 & \texttt{notebooks} & Notebooks import physics from src.core, no re-implementation \\
7 & \texttt{lean_source} & Key theorem names found in Lean source files \\
8 & \texttt{cgl_fdr} & CGL FDR derivation produces correct results \\
9 & \texttt{lean_build} & Lean project builds cleanly (requires lake) \\
10 & \texttt{viz_consistency} & Notebook visualizations use imported physics and consistent style \\
11 & \texttt{notebook_exec} & All notebooks execute without errors \\
12 & \texttt{physical_bounds} & All computed quantities within physical bounds \\
13 & \texttt{cross_path_consistency} & Different code paths agree within 0.5%/1% tolerance \\
14 & \texttt{paper_provenance} & Paper numerical claims trace to computations within 0.5% \\
15 & \texttt{parameter_provenance} & Every experimental parameter has verified provenance \\
16 & \texttt{counts_fresh} & counts.json / counts.tex are up-to-date vs. sources \\
17 & \texttt{tables_fresh} & Paper tables (tables/*.tex) are up-to-date vs. pipeline sources \\
18 & \texttt{numerical_literals} & Paper .tex files free of inline numerical literals outside \\input{} blocks \\
19 & \texttt{graph_integrity} & Knowledge graph integrity — orphans, conflicts, broken chains \\
20 & \texttt{count_literals} & Paper .tex files reference counts via \\input{counts.tex} macros, not literals \\
21 & \texttt{readiness_submission_gate} & Every paper has all P1 readiness gates passed (Phase 5v Wave 4) \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
